# NSIDC Sea Ice Index - Northern Hemisphere Monthly Extent and Area
# Source: https://nsidc.org/data/seaice_index/
# Extent and Area in 10^6 sq km
# Missing data indicated by -9999.00
Year,  Mo, Data type, Region, Extent, Area
1978,  10,  Goddard,      N,  10.69, -9999.00

1978,  12,  Goddard,      N,  13.19,  11.85
1979,   1,  Goddard,      N,  15.56,  13.95
1979,   2,  Goddard,      N,  15.92,  14.62
